final:
module RefModule(
  input clk,
  input cs,
  input rw,
  input [7:0] addr,
  input [7:0] din,
  output reg [7:0] dout // Change to reg type
);reg [7:0] unused_memory [0:255];

always @(posedge clk) begin
  if (cs) begin
    if (rw) begin // read from unused_memory
      dout <= unused_memory[addr];
    end else begin // write to unused_memory
      unused_memory[addr] <= din;
    end
  end
end

endmodule
